Section: Source Material References.

Table summary.
Document: source-materials/bylaws/Constitution, Bylaws, and Covenant 2018.pdf. Purpose: Current bylaws/covenant source for officer and approval questions.. Owner: Church / Clerk TBD. Status: Needs bylaw review. Review needed by: Pastor, Deacons, Nominating Committee, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Surfaced in the site through docs/governance/constitution-and-bylaws-reference.md; confirm this is the current authoritative version..
Document: source-materials/existing-job-descriptions/final-approved/KBC_Treasurer_Job_Description_Rev_Nov2025.pdf. Purpose: Current approved Treasurer job description source.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs committee input. Review needed by: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Nominating Committee. Priority: High. Notes: Key source for duty split discussion..
Document: source-materials/existing-job-descriptions/accountability-frameworks/4_Treasurer Evaluation & Accountability Framework.docx. Purpose: Treasurer evaluation source.. Owner: Personnel Committee. Status: Needs Personnel input. Review needed by: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Priority: Medium. Notes: Determine whether this is approved, draft, or superseded..
Document: source-materials/prior-proposals/treasurer/KBC Treasurer - Alternative Proposal 010926.pdf. Purpose: Prior Treasurer structure proposal.. Owner: Finance Committee / Personnel Committee. Status: Needs committee input. Review needed by: Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Priority: Medium. Notes: Mine for useful ideas after leadership direction..
Document: source-materials/prior-proposals/miller-management/The Kingsville Baptist Church Proposal-Level 1 Accounting - with QuickBooks.pdf. Purpose: Outsourced accounting / QuickBooks proposal source.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance input. Review needed by: Finance Committee. Priority: Medium. Notes: Review only after software/vendor requirements are set..
Document: source-materials/prior-proposals/finance/July 20th, 2025 budget meeting handout.pdf. Purpose: Prior budget meeting source.. Owner: Finance Committee. Status: Needs Finance input. Review needed by: Finance Committee. Priority: Medium. Notes: Use for context, not as current policy..

Section: Dashboard Notes.

Ready for review means the document is ready for the named body to read and discuss, not approved.
Needs committee input means more than one body needs to discuss ownership or direction.
Parking lot means the document should wait until more urgent decisions are made.
Status should be updated after each committee meeting.

End of chapter: Project Dashboard.
